production_note: agentic_L1 dual-LLM skeptic: sealed receipt write; packet-only; no bulk writers; no identity stamps
knowledge_boundary: Only landing + prior + active packet content.

exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List

@dataclass
class ClientRecord:
    client_id: str
    full_name: str
    emails: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

c = ClientRecord('C001', 'Ana Perez', ['ana@ejemplo.pe'])
print(c)

exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass, field
from typing import List

@dataclass
class ClientRecord:
    client_id: str
    full_name: str
    emails: List[str] = field(default_factory=list)

a = ClientRecord('C1', 'A')
b = ClientRecord('C2', 'B')
a.emails.append('x@y.z')
print(len(a.emails), len(b.emails))

exercises.code:
from dataclasses import dataclass

@dataclass
class RelationshipEvidence:
    kind: str
    signal_score: float
    note: str = ''

ev = [
    RelationshipEvidence('shared_phone', 0.31),
    RelationshipEvidence('geo', 0.12),
]
print('E1 n_ev', len(ev))
print('scores', [e.signal_score for e in ev])

selfcheck.justification_from_packet: field(default_factory=list) evita el default mutable compartido entre instancias de dataclass.
RelationshipEvidence.signal_score es señal/dato numérico, no veredicto de fraude o familia.
Protocol EntityStore define un puerto get/save implementable por fakes y adapters.
Objeto inválido debe fallar en la construcción (__post_init__/validate), no más tarde.
Client hereda de Person a menudo es frágil; composición (Client tiene PersonInfo) suele bastar.
El dominio de familiaridad no debe exponer is_fraud() automático.

confusion_points: S11: contrasté contratos de pass con theory antes de afirmar labels de dominio.
